PLAINTIFF'S EX PARTE REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER TO ALLOW SERVICE ON SECRETARY OF STATE FOR A DOMESTIC CORPORATION;DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUSKAT, HAROLD P. AS TO DEFENDANT SATYRICON, INC.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO ALLOW SERVICE ON SECRETARY OF STATE FOR A DOMESTIC CORPORATION. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.

RECORD OF SERVICE OF PROCESS (FOR SERVICE BY SECRETARY OF STATE & SERVICE BY PLAINTIFF ON SECRETARY OF STATE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUSKAT, HAROLD P. AS TO DEFENDANT SATYRICON, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MUSKAT, HAROLD P. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SATYRICON, INC. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,140.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SC-109 - AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR FILED BY DEFENDANT SATYRICON, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-07-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-07-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY SATYRICON, INC. IS GRANTED.

NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
